case_title: FRANCIS PENALBA VS. EMMANUEL B VICERAL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-29-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VICERAL, EMMANUEL B

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES AGREED TO A SETTLMENT AT THE PRIOR HEARING AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
